name: Pishon
oracleText:
Pishon, River of Gold enters the battlefield tapped.
{T}: Add {C}.
Whenever one or more artifacts enter the battlefield under your control, if this ability hasn't triggered this turn, create a Treasure token.
flavorText: "The gold of that land is good." — Genesis 2:12
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses the Walters manuscript page "Fountain of Life and the Four Rivers of Paradise" via Wikimedia Commons.
title: River of Gold
